title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED ONE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4366 / 57 OG No. 13, 2293 (March 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 2899, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines of the Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (t) of subparagraph 46, for the Province of Romblon, under paragraph d, Section two of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-three hundred one is amended to read as follows:

(t) Maternity and Childrens Clinic, Romblonâ

Construction and improve Ment ..................... P25,000.00

SEC. 2. Item (c) of subparagraph 1, for Jones, Romblon, under paragraph e, Section two of the same Act, is amended to read as follows:

"(c) Libtong Barrio School Building... P5,000.00

SEC. 3. Thid Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
